title: Fluffy Greek Yogurt Casserole
description: A tangy, fluffy breakfast casserole with a lightly caramelized honey‑olive oil topping that’s both energizing and low‑calorie.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, eggs, honey, vanilla, baking soda, and salt until smooth.
Fold in the chopped walnuts and applesauce, if using.
Grease a 9x9 inch baking dish with a light spray of olive oil and pour the batter in, spreading evenly.
Bake for 35–40 minutes, or until the top is set and a toothpick comes out clean.

While the casserole bakes, combine 1 tablespoon honey, 1 tablespoon olive oil, and 1 tablespoon water in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir until the mixture thickens and turns a light amber color, about 3–5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Remove the casserole from the oven, drizzle the caramel sauce over the top, and let it set for a few minutes before serving.
